response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and learning ability across diverse technologies, they lack the mandatory technical requirements for this role. With only ~6 months of professional C++ experience (vs. required 5-10 years) and zero demonstrated capital markets or financial services domain knowledge, they would require substantial reskilling in both core technologies and industry domain. The career trajectory (web, mobile, GIS, media) shows no intersection with capital markets development.
strengths: Extensive general software engineering experience (25+ years) with demonstrated ability to learn diverse technologies and platforms
Proven CI/CD and DevOps infrastructure expertise (GitLab, Docker, Artifactory), plus high-performance systems experience from data integration work
Strong communication and knowledge-sharing skills (workshops, open-source contributions, teaching)
concerns: Critical gap in C++ experience: only ~6 months professional (National Instruments) vs. required 5-10 years; career focused on web/mobile/scripting languages
No demonstrated capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or financial services domain experience; entirely different career trajectory
No specific SQL Server or Oracle experience evident; only generic SQL mention with no enterprise database project details
